text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
choice_data_list:
But this isn't nearly enough for your new dorm
residents...

But this isn't nearly enough for your new dorm
residents...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nah, that's all right. I'll figure out a way to make
it work.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I could put it on display for everyone instead. It's
the thought that counts, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll be sure to let all the new residents know that
you sent 'em over with love!
